accurate.why: all claims supported by bill text or accurate context

changes_to_existing_law.why: describes funding levels and policy riders restricting/directing fund use

exceptions_conditions.why: notes carve-outs/exceptions (e.g., abortion exceptions for rape/incest/life)

effective_dates.why: notes FY ending Sept 30 2025, 120-day obligation, report deadlines

major_provisions_covered.why: captures appropriations structure plus major riders

correct_entities.why: DHS components, Mayorkas, Disinformation Governance Board, executive orders correct

correct_figures.why: CBP ~$16.6B, ICE ~$10.5B, DRF $22.7B, $600M barriers (18-30ft bollard), $300M tech, $154M rescission all verified

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
